head_meta_description: Light Brokerage Platform by BeBroker. A simplified premium brokerage setup with fast launch and flexible branding.
seo_og_description: Light Brokerage Platform by BeBroker. A simplified premium brokerage setup with fast launch and flexible branding.
seo_twitter_description: Light Brokerage Platform by BeBroker. A simplified premium brokerage setup with fast launch and flexible branding.
hero_heading: Get Your Own Brokerage Brand with $0 Monthly Fee
hero_subtitle: A simplified trading platform designed for a better user experience. Everything you need - nothing you don't.
benefits_title: A premium launch model with less friction
benefits_text: High-conversion brokerage infrastructure focused on speed, clarity, and practical execution.
benefits_markets_text: Forex, Crypto, Stocks, Commodities — curated for maximum trader engagement.
benefits_customizable_text: Your brand, your logo, your domain — fully white-labeled from day one.
benefits_psp_text: Ready-to-use payment service providers — accept deposits from day one with zero setup overhead.
benefits_license_text: We cover the complete legal and regulatory structure for you.
features_text: Give your traders a seamless, top-notch trading experience with a lightweight and modern product architecture.
features_clean_design_text: A lightweight interface designed to reduce user friction and simplify user experience.
features_one_mechanic_text: One trading mechanic: buy and sell in one click. Simple by design.
features_high_conversion_text: Simple interface increases conversion from the first interaction.
features_payments_ready_text: Pre-integrated payment methods for quick deposits.
features_web_instant_text: Works on every device. Give your traders a seamless trading experience both web and mobile.
features_profit_retention_text: Keep the majority of revenue from your traffic.
pricing_text: One transparent entry package with essential setup, legal structure, and core support included.
pricing_highlight_no_fees_text: Flat one-time setup with clear terms
pricing_card_guarantee: Full support during setup. No risk — if we can't deliver, you get a refund.
promo_text: Fill out the form and chat with our managers to discuss your project and see how quickly you can set up your brokerage business.
steps_text: From initial request to live platform in five simple steps.
steps_step1_text: Fill out the form and tell us about your project.
steps_step2_text: Explore the platform and its trading interface.
steps_step3_text: Apply your branding, logo, and domain settings.
steps_step4_text: Finalize terms and complete the agreement.
steps_step5_text: Your platform goes live and is ready for traders.
faq_intro: Can't find the answer you're looking for? Reach out to our team — we're happy to help.
faq_a1: Typical launches are completed within 7 days for the basic package, with full onboarding support included.
faq_a2: No. The package includes a legal structure option so you can start operating without building a license framework from zero.
faq_a3: Standard integrations include Visa, Mastercard, Crypto, Pix, and Boleto, with additional providers available by request.
faq_q4: Can I use my own branding?
faq_a4: Yes. You can apply your logo, colour direction, and domain from day one. The platform is fully white-labelled.
faq_a5: The platform includes 30+ popular markets — Forex, Crypto, Stocks, and Commodities — and can be expanded based on your strategy.
faq_q6: What's included in the Basic plan?
faq_a6: Web Traderoom, CRM, Back Office, Dealing Desk, Billing, Liquidity, Servers, KYC, Options, Antifraud, SMS, and Affiliate Module — everything you need to operate a brokerage.
faq_a7: No. The Basic plan has a one-time setup fee of $15,000 with $0 monthly charges. You keep 85% of the profit from your traffic.
contact_text: Share a few details and our managers will prepare a tailored rollout plan for your market.
contact_label_why_launch: Why do you want to launch?
contact_placeholder_why_launch: e.g. New revenue stream, monetize traffic...
contact_terms_text: By checking the box I consent to the terms and conditions and privacy policy.
form_success_text: We'll send the business plan to you by email shortly!

modal_placeholder_why_launch: e.g. New revenue stream, monetize traffic...
modal_terms_text: By checking the box I consent to the terms and conditions and privacy policy.
